prompt: Create a lavish vertical fantasy illustration of one enormous flowering bonsai tree in a wide porcelain planter, set in a dreamy cosmic night garden. The bonsai has a twisted, glossy, rose-gold trunk and branching limbs, with a dense rounded canopy made from countless succulent-like rosette blossoms in pearl pink, lavender, lilac, peach, and opalescent white; the petals should look translucent, dewy, and jewel-like with sparkling highlights. Add many long hanging crystal-bead strands and delicate dripping garlands beneath the branches, like luminous wisteria made of pearls and glass. The planter is one large pale pink-lavender bowl with ornate silver baroque floral metal ornaments on the front, sitting on an intricately carved circular silver pedestal. At the lower right, place exactly one sleeping white fluffy cat curled peacefully on the pedestal beside a few pastel pearl spheres. The background is a deep starry galaxy sky filled with glowing bokeh, tiny stars, floating petals, and magical dust, with exactly one large pale moon partially visible in the upper right corner. Surround the base with soft clusters of pink and purple blossoms and glowing pearls. Use an ultra-detailed anime fantasy art style, romantic and ethereal, high saturation pastels, iridescent lighting, soft bloom, crystalline sparkle, ornate decorative craftsmanship, serene bedtime mood, vertical composition, no text, no watermark.
